prompt_text:
### Demographics: 68-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 69.3 kg; Height 165.2 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.3%; 6 months ago 6.3%; 3 months ago 6.1%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 133mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 131mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 124mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.3kg; 9 months ago 69.2kg; 6 months ago 65.8kg; 3 months ago 69.1kg; current 69.3kg), Height (12 months ago 165.2cm; 9 months ago 165.2cm; 6 months ago 165.2cm; 3 months ago 165.2cm; current 165.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 127U/L; 9 months ago 122U/L; 6 months ago 109U/L; 3 months ago 111U/L; current 123U/L), AST (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 60U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 67U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 964mg/g; 9 months ago 965mg/g; 6 months ago 755mg/g; 3 months ago 735mg/g; current 708mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 95mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 136mg/dL; 9 months ago 116mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 116mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.8g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
